name: vibe-coding-launch-security-checklist
description: AI-readable pre-launch security checklist for vibe coding MVP projects.

scripts.validate: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const data=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('data/checklist.json','utf8')); if(data.categories.length!==20 || data.items.length!==100) throw new Error('Expected 20 categories and 100 items'); console.log('Checklist OK:', data.categories.length, 'categories,', data.items.length, 'items');"
